nasb.text: So the slave fell to the ground and prostrated himself before him, saying, ‘Have patience with me and I will repay you everything.’

esv.text: So the servantfell on his knees, imploring him, ‘Have patience with me, and I will pay you everything.’

cnv.text: 那僕人就跪下拜他，說：‘請寬容我，我會把一切還給你的。’

ccb.text: 那奴仆跪在王面前乞求说，‘请宽容我，我会把债务全部还清的。’

csbs.text: “那奴仆就俯伏拜他，说：‘    请宽容我吧，将来我会把一切偿还给你。’
